signals.title: USD/JPY — Geopolitical + Carry
signals.text: Middle East escalation drives safe-haven demand — JPY COT LF net short −65,309 (crowded carry). USD/JPY at 158.86; safe-haven bid competes with 450bp Fed-BoJ carry differential. Risk-off flow historically unwinds JPY shorts — watch 157.00 as the first technical level on a sustained risk-off move.

signals.title: AUD/USD — Positioning + Vol
signals.text: AUD/USD long% at 72.0% (CFTC) and retail short at 89% — extreme positioning on both sides. HV30 at 6.5%, ATM IV at 8.1% — options pricing a 1.6 vol-pt premium over realized. AUD/USD at 0.7179, price action stalling — late-trend caution signal. Watch for LF delta turning positive or volatility compression to shift the read.

signals.title: GBP/USD — CB + Yield
signals.text: BoE at 3.75% vs Fed at 3.75% — 0bp GBP-USD yield differential; structural support neutral. GBP LF net long +28,426 (CFTC); AM constructive — positioning aligned with carry. GBP/USD at 1.3531 mid-range; 1.3600 is the next resistance on a continuation.

signals.title: NZD/USD — Retail Sentiment
signals.text: NZD/USD retail short at 63% — short bias but not extreme. NZD/USD COT LF net short −17,090; AM −38,519. NZD/USD at 0.5892; price action contained. No major data releases scheduled today — watch for technical levels.
